other_observers: MOB; Scott Rashid and Judy Wright
specific_location: On the fence across from the "Cherokee Draw" parking area at Lake Estes on Hwy. 36.
description: Head, nape, and sides of neck gray with darker gray lores. Dark eye. Dark brown bill. Whitish underparts with somewhat pale salmon-colored axillaries, flanks and undertail coverts. Brown wings. Inner rectrices black, outer rectrices white. Rectrices progressively longer from inner to outer creating a forked tail. Legs blackish. The pale salmon color along with tail length indicates that this bird is not an adult male. This is either a second year male or a female bird.Behaviors: Actively flycatching from both a fence and from high bare branches in trees.Call: not heardPlumage: See description
photographer: Photographer: Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper, Rachel Hopper
